Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions. Granted, no opposition filed. Defendant to pay plaintiff $640 in sanctions within 15 days of notice of entry of the order. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2010 Continued To Nov-05-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas B. Provencher, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Gary E. Looney, President of Creditors Trade Association, Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Embassy Investments-Brisbane, LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Courtyard by Marriott, 3 Embassy Investments-Napa Valley, LLC, a Georgia limited liability company, dba Hilton Garden Inn, Sushil Ramu Patel, individually as guarantor of Embasy Investments, LLC, or Embassy Investments, LLC a Georgia limited liabilty company, dba Courtyard by Marriott.
Defaults were entered against the defendants on May 21, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 21, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, and against the Defaulted Defendants Embassy Investments-Brisbane, LLC, a California limited liability company, dba Courtyard by Marriott, 3 Embassy Investments-Napa Valley, LLC, a Georgia limited liability company, dba Hilton Garden Inn, Sushil Ramu Patel, individually as guarantor of Embasy Investments, LLC, and Embassy Investments, LLC a Georgia limited liabilty company, dba Courtyard by Marriott, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $31,232.90.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,003.00.
Attorney Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $730.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $34,965.90.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-10-2010 Continued To Sep-21-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Dave Marcollini, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party:

No other appearance, After hearing:
(1) Plaintiff's Ex Parte Application For Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Embassy Investments, LLC. is Granted.
(2) Plaintiff's Ex Parte Application For Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Sushil Ramu Patel is Granted. Orders signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
